title: FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES - 211info
text: DEVNW SALEM FINANCIAL WELLBEING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides classes, workshops, and one-on-one counseling in the areas of homeownership and personal finance. NeighborWorks Homeownership Center offers HUD-certified homeownership counseling and foreclosure avoidance counseling. Also provides one-on-one financial counseling and student debt counseling. 528 Cottage Street NE Suite 1C Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Email (503) 779-2680 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 779-2680 Alternate (541) 345-7106 ext 2060 Ross Kanaga [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Annual membership is $75 which includes access to counseling, classes, and workshops, and Financial Wellbeing Services program. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Marion, Linn, Benton, and Lane Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8am-6pm Services: Financial Literacy Training Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling HUD Approved Counseling Agencies Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Personal Financial Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - COMMUNITY LENDINGWORKS COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNTS HOUSING/SHELTER - DOWN PAYMENT ASSISTANCE MONEY MANAGEMENT - FORECLOSURE AVOIDANCE AND EVICTION PREVENTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. DEVNW SALEM
